name: Compare formats
info:
Two chains: WAV (PCM) vs MP3 (compressed).
Bundled files: examples/sounds/beep.wav and beep.mp3 (same short tone).
Default players: afplay for WAV, mpg123 for MP3. On macOS you can set both playa nodes to afplay — it plays MP3 too. On Linux use aplay or play for WAV and mpg123/mplayer for MP3.

name: path beep.wav
path beep.mp3
